title: Zibas Clásicas Creamy Chive Dip
ingredients: 1 bag of Ziba's Clásicas potato chips
1/2 cup Mexican crema or sour cream
instructions: Step 1. In a bowl, mix the crema with the Greek yogurt until well combined.
Step 2. Add the crumbled bacon, chopped chives, fresh herbs, and a splash of lemon juice.
Step 3. Gently mix and adjust salt to taste.
Step 4. Serve the dip cold with Ziba's Clásicas potato chips for sharing.
